productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Solid Purple Muffler
description: Enjoy The winter in style with this knit muffler with tassels and layered ruffles running down its length from united colors of benetton. Drape it or knot it over your t-shirts or kurtas and enjoy that chaat in the cold! Made of 100% acrylic Length: 185 cm Width: 70 cm Wash care Hand wash separately using a mild detergent Do not bleach or tumble dry
